role: daily completed-bar context (no trade engine, no Y, no entry gate)

_meta.purpose: Machine registry + KNOWLEDGE BASE for the 1d daily-context namespace (Feature IDs 101..199). standard_trendline_features = FT101..FT108: the SAME eight standard trendline features computed on completed 1d bars (column names carry the _1d suffix). additional_features = F109..F199. Disabled by default; selectable per Asset. Causal as-of: only completed 1d bars with available_at <= decision_timestamp may enter X (the latest such coarse SETUP state).

standard_trendline_features.name: distance_to_trend_line_1d
standard_trendline_features.formula: direction * (close[T] - L_trend(T)) / ATR(W_ATR)[T] on the latest completed 1d setup state available as-of decision_timestamp

standard_trendline_features.name: distance_to_opposing_line_1d
standard_trendline_features.formula: direction * (close[T] - L_opp(T)) / ATR(W_ATR)[T] on the latest completed 1d setup state available as-of decision_timestamp

standard_trendline_features.name: risk_box_height_pct_1d
standard_trendline_features.formula: 100 * R0 / max(EPS, abs(L_trend(T))) on the latest completed 1d setup state available as-of decision_timestamp

standard_trendline_features.name: bar_return_pct_1d
standard_trendline_features.formula: (close[T] - close[T-1]) / close[T-1] * 100 on completed 1d bars (T>=1 else NaN), latest as-of decision_timestamp

standard_trendline_features.name: body_to_range_ratio_1d
standard_trendline_features.formula: abs(close[T]-open[T]) / (high[T]-low[T]) on completed 1d bars (high==low -> 0.0), latest as-of decision_timestamp

standard_trendline_features.name: volume_z_score_1d
standard_trendline_features.formula: (volume[T] - rolling_mean(volume,W_VOL)[T]) / rolling_std(volume,W_VOL)[T] on completed 1d bars (std==0 -> 0.0; pre-window -> NaN), latest as-of decision_timestamp

standard_trendline_features.name: touch_count_1d
standard_trendline_features.formula: number of trendline touchpoints (>= MIN_TOUCHES) within the detector lookback on completed 1d bars, latest as-of decision_timestamp

standard_trendline_features.name: direction_1d
standard_trendline_features.formula: setup side in {-1,+1} of the latest completed 1d setup state available as-of decision_timestamp

additional_features.name: log_return_5_1d
additional_features.formula: ln(close[T] / close[T-5]) on completed 1d bars (T>=5 else NaN), latest as-of decision_timestamp
